name: Done
doc: Outputs a one when the src ugen (typically an envelope) has finished

name: EnvGen
doc: envelope generator, interpolates across a path of control points over time, see the overtone.sc.envelope functions to generate the control points array Note: The actual minimum duration of a segment is not zero, but one sample step for audio rate and one block for control rate. This may result in asynchronicity when in two envelopes of different number of levels, the envelope times add up to the same total duration. Similarly, when modulating times, the new time is only updated at the end of the current segment - this may lead to asynchronicity of two envelopes with modulated times.

argDocs.gate: this triggers the envelope and holds it open while > 0. If the envelope is fixed-length (e.g. perc), the gate argument is used as a simple trigger. If it is an sustaining envelope (e.g. adsr, asr), the envelope is held open until the gate becomes 0, at which point is released. If the gate of an env-gen is set to -1 or below, then the envelope will cutoff immediately. The time for it to cutoff is the amount less than -1, with -1 being as fast as possible, -1.5 being a cutoff in 0.5 seconds, etc. The cutoff shape is linear.
argDocs.levelScale: scales the levels of the breakpoints.
argDocs.levelBias: offsets the levels of the breakpoints.
argDocs.timeScale: scales the durations of the segments.
argDocs.action: an integer representing an action to be executed when the env is finished playing. This can be used to free the enclosing synth, etc.

name: Free
doc: Free the specified node when triggered

name: FreeSelf
doc: Free the enclosing synth when triggered

name: FreeSelfWhenDone
doc: Free the enclosing synth when the src ugen finishes (e.g. env-gen, play-buf, linen...)

argDocs.src: the ugen to check for done

argDocs.ienvelope: an InterplEnv (this is static for the life of the UGen)
argDocs.index: a point to access within the InterplEnv

name: Linen
doc: A linear envelope generator, rises to sus-level over attack-time seconds and after the gate goes non-positive falls over release-time to finally perform the (optional) action

argDocs.attackTime: Time taken to rise to susLevel in seconds
argDocs.susLevel: Level to hold the envelope at until gate is triggered
argDocs.releaseTime: Time to fall from susLevel back to 0 after the gate has been triggered

name: Pause
doc: Pause a specified node when triggered

argDocs.gate: when gate is 0, node is paused, when 1 it runs

name: PauseSelf
doc: Pause the enclosing synth when triggered

name: PauseSelfWhenDone
doc: Pause the enclosing synth when the src ugen finishes (e.g. env-gen, play-buf, linen...)

argDocs.src: the ugen to check for done
